description_en: Bassora, in Iraq, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.2/5. Muslim travelers will find 15 halal restaurants, 74 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Bassora: 15+ halal restaurants, 74 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 4.2/5.
